monitor.title: 通用智能体 Live Monitor
monitor.detectFailed: Monitor detection failed, click to configure manually
monitor.notInstalled: No local monitor detected, click to install/connect
monitor.error: Detection failed. You can still input URL manually.
monitor.missing: Star Office is not detected on this machine.
monitor.assistPromptInstalled: Star Office is detected at {{url}}. Please guide me to connect and introduce the available workflows.
monitor.installPrompt: Please install and start the Star Office visualization service, then guide me to connect.
monitor.diagnosePrompt: Star Office connection has issues. Please diagnose and fix them.
monitor.visualDesc: Star Office is a visual companion for 通用智能体. It turns chat-side status into a live, interactive monitor view.
monitor.visualFallbackDesc: 通用智能体 chat status becomes a visual office scene.
monitor.visualImageCaptionFallback: Preview image unavailable, open project for full screenshots.
monitor.hint: Input monitor URL manually, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:19000
